reviews.review_title: Engaging and fun, but some glitches
reviews.review_description:
Me and a couple friends tried using it. I was able to go through the surgery no problem, but both of my friends repeatedly got stuck on steps. I tried using their device too and I couldn't get it to work/advance. It kept thinking we weren't doing it right. 

We got stuck on:

1. Using the forceps to open the incision.
2. Manipulating the probe using a 2-step trigger process. Sometimes it worked, sometimes it didn't. I think this step we got stuck because the instructions weren't clear that you need to hold both triggers to manipulate the probe, not just one? 

Overall great and fun but some glitches. Happy to talk more with developers to help them fix these issues!
